facts_promoted.fact: Carrols LLC and Nashville Quality LLC operate BK Restaurants in US, may sell to franchisees
BK APac's 999 company restaurants sold to franchisee as of Jan 30, 2026
RSI board: 21 members (18 franchisees, 1 BKC, 1 minority, 1 independent)
Supplier rebates 7.9% of consolidated fund revenue (FY2025)
Training director: Greg Moscetti, joined June 2025, 15+ years experience
NFA CEO: Christy Williams, Kennesaw GA, (678) 797-5160
Advertising fund breakdown FY2025: Working media 80.0%, Production 3.3%, Agency 6.9%, Other 9.8%
Insurance: CGL $2M/occurrence, auto $1M, property full replacement, boiler/machinery full replacement
Double Drive-Thru required for most facility types (adds $80K-$120K)

item19_cohort_comparability.finding: No material comparability discrepancy found. Item 19 reports actual Gross Sales for restaurants operating during FY2025. The sales data includes restaurants paying various royalty and advertising rates (standard 4.5%, reduced DIP rates, DA rates, legacy rates from prior programs). BKC does not present a pro-forma or cost-adjusted FPR. The current new-franchisee royalty rate (4.5%) and advertising rate (4.5%) are the same as the standard rates disclosed in Item 6. Some restaurants in the sample may pay reduced rates under prior programs, which would give them a slight operating advantage vs. new franchisees. However, the FPR reports Gross Sales (top-line), not net income, so the royalty/advertising rate difference does not directly affect the reported figures.
